title: Portfolio Website
description: Built a fully responsive personal portfolio with dark/light mode, particle animations, and framer motion interactions.
problem: Needed a professional online presence to showcase skills and attract opportunities.
action: Designed and built from scratch using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.
result: Live portfolio deployed on Vercel with smooth animations and mobile-first design.
